title: Ryuunosuke Carries the Crew Upward
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on ryuunosuke carries the crew upward within the Climbing the Elephant storyline.
scene: Luffy's group climbs Zunesha, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro behind them, then enters the empty and damaged Mokomo Dukedom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Perhaps they fell into the sea?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We are unharmed, more or less.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We shall catch up with you before you know it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WHADAYA MEAN! You're one of us now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're coming down to get you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oi, Dragon! Time to Turn Arou...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Poor Ryuu, we can't just ask him to turn around now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: True. And we need to get this mission over with as soon as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's gonna be rough shedding but I guess we gotta press on... I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry but it looks like we'll be going ahead afterall!! We'll meet you guys there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You scum! Unauthorized entry into this country will not be permitted!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Call me crazy but I think I just heard an unfamiliar voice amidst that 8 ruckus...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll be rewriting back to a painting, right?

summary: Ryuunosuke Carries the Crew Upward: Luffy's group reaches the country on Zunesha's back, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro temporarily, and discovers that Zou has already been devastated.
